title: DELILA-Rust per-channel time offsets (timeSettings.json, tree form)
description: Tree-based per-channel time offset table (SPEC v0.5.1 § 4.3). Each entry has a parent reference and an offset to apply at HitSource ingress. Convention: aligned_ts = raw_ts - offset_ns. Multi-root forests are allowed (warn at load). The legacy single-reference TimeCalibration schema is also accepted by `event_builder build` but lives outside this file.

$schema.description: Optional reference back to this schema (editor hint).

oneOf.description: This entry is a root of the offset tree (no parent).
[parent_module, parent_channel] — must point at another entry in the file.

offset_ns.description: Offset relative to the parent; aligned_ts = raw_ts - offset_ns. Root entries usually have offset_ns = 0.
